headline: IBKR Unveils Unified Crypto Trading Platform for European Investors
summary: Interactive Brokers expands into crypto in Europe, enabling trading of 11 digital assets alongside traditional investments on a unified platform.

headline: Interactive Brokers Group Reports Brokerage Metrics and Other Financial Information for March 2026, includes Reg.-NMS Execution Statistics
summary: GREENWICH, Conn., April 01, 2026--Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: IBKR) an automated global electronic broker, today reported its Electronic Brokerage monthly performance metrics for March.

headline: Interactive Brokers (IBKR) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of electronic brokerage firm Interactive Brokers (NASDAQ:IBKR) jumped 4.5% in the afternoon session after the company launched crypto-asset trading for individual investors in the European Economic Area.
